category_sources: source_facts.description says security assessment and troubleshooting tool for IPv6; official GitHub repository describes SI6 Networks' IPv6 Toolkit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ipv6toolkit; official GitHub repository is fgont/ipv6toolkit and homepage is SI6 Networks IPv6 Toolkit.
docs_sources: Official project homepage is source_facts.homepage; official GitHub README is an official documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/fgont/ipv6toolkit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IPv6 security assessment and troubleshooting; source_facts.executables list protocol-specific IPv6 tools such as scan6, tcp6, udp6, and icmp6.
